ICRA 2016, International Conference on Robotics and Automation.

Date: May 16-21.

Location: Stockholm, Sweden (Europe).

Website: https://www.icra2016.org/conference/program-2/

Aerial Robotics and Unmanned Aerial Vehicles, IEEE Robotics and Automation Technical Committee
